{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017360394A26C3745B918C7B37A"}"},"total":3133},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7125782180710073121","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本小说真的超好看！我看简介的时候就爱上了！然后我本来就是个耽美粉，想着找作者的其他书看来着，点进作者的个人主页一看，我c！这是作者的第一本小说！[快哭了][快哭了]还写得这么好！作者大大算我求你了多写点耽美文，你写作技术是真的好！！还有作者大大加油更新噢！[送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1659100539,"group_id":"7110928018259840034","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"℃","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7R2pXmRqphOsQ6BO6dQPq3fZ1tZFgtYrj3MZjW/tVd8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/715771b58b8046208437b40c96c7fd97~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776534699&x-signature=p5MyMhF%2B3XQMUVPySnLe3aFODkg%3D","user_id":"3601601810669662","user_name":"Le.²³-"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3601601810669662","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7110928018259840034","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主，1V1，超甜，双洁】
【疯批丧心病狂大佬玩家×又萌又怂大腿挂件NPC】
游篱进到惊悚游戏世界，莫名成了NPC。
其他NPC都在吓人，只有游篱在吓鬼。 
疗养院副本 
游篱努力扮鬼吓人，反被提着电锯的疯批大佬玩家追得嗷嗷叫。 
游篱：我不吓你，别砍我行吗？  
鬼门村副本 
游篱违反NPC守则，被系统惩罚困在井里出不去。 
疯批大佬砍鬼路过，顺手把他捞了上去。 
大佬：小可爱，再努力点吓到我，我给你烧纸钱。 
游篱：好气，想哭！  
邪神副本 
游篱接到系统任务，要他扮成女巫去接近邪神。 
献祭当天，女巫游篱十分紧张：我这算是嫁给邪神了吗？我还没准备好呢。 
邪神大佬：我已经准备好了。  
突变病栋副本 
游篱被系统惩罚，陷入被玩家追被NPC宰的危机。 
在看到游篱身后拳打邪神、脚踢厉鬼、烹神煮怪的大佬时，所有人吓得屁滚尿流。 
游篱掐腰：我这么腻害！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/11f551226a9d26563b9606f1faaae84e","author":"伏西米","author_id":"","book_id":"7110928018259840034","book_name":"成为惊悚游戏NPC被大佬撩翻了","book_short_name":"惊叫攻略","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#280808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":520,"name":"大佬","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=520&name=大佬&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7110930078426464801","read_count":"11186","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1172950"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"579","tags":"双男主,现代,系统,甜宠,HE,大佬,双洁,纯爱,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/814e4320bbeba82050efc23a737c0dc7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779183363&x-signature=lc6RuMRvarF5E6OOwPxClQRtwR4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list
